task: askr is a multi-agent session management system for Claude Code; prior sessions fixed handover document generation, guard system boundary validation, and companion session lifecycle. This session discovered a critical security vulnerability (live Discord webhook in public GitHub history) and initiated a comprehensive launch-readiness audit to identify all blockers before public release.
discussion_summary: Previous sessions resolved cross-repo contamination, guard hallucination, and session handoff synchronization. This session pivoted to launch readiness after user expressed public commitment to release askr via brew install within one week. A critical finding emerged: the public GitHub repository contains a plaintext Discord webhook URL in committed history (commit 50eba93 on origin/main), requiring immediate remediation via git history rewrite. User requested a comprehensive audit of all launch blockers including test coverage, dependencies, documentation, deployment readiness, and TODO/FIXME markers before public announcement.

accomplishments.what: Fixed 8 hallucination and boundary issues in guard system: cross-repo boundary validation, retry state tracking, guard rule tightening, and decision.jsonl pollution prevention
Fixed companion session opening to wait for Stop hook completion signal instead of watching for stats file deletion
Fixed handover document generation to scope file paths to askr repository only, preventing cross-repo contamination in project state
Discovered critical security vulnerability: live Discord webhook URL exposed in plaintext in public GitHub repository history (commit 50eba93, origin/main)
Initiated comprehensive launch-readiness audit: scanned codebase for TODO/FIXME/XXX markers, hardcoded paths, test coverage gaps, dependency declarations, and deployment script validation

in_progress.what: Launch-readiness audit results pending: background agents running verification of unbuilt safety gates, race conditions, test suite validation, and deployment readiness assessment. Audit completion awaited.

next_actions.action: URGENT: Rotate Discord webhook URL immediately. Remove plaintext webhook from git history using git-filter-branch or BFG Repo-Cleaner, force-push to origin/main, and regenerate webhook in Discord settings.
next_actions.why: Live webhook URL is publicly exposed in GitHub history; any actor can post to askr's Discord channel. This is a critical security vulnerability blocking public release.

next_actions.action: Await completion of background launch-readiness audit agents and review findings: identify all TODO/FIXME/XXX markers, hardcoded paths, test coverage gaps, missing documentation, deployment script validation, and dependency lock files. Produce prioritized blockers list.
next_actions.why: User committed to public release (brew install) and is telling people it will be live in a week. Audit must identify all gaps before announcement.

next_actions.action: Validate test suite passes end-to-end: confirm pytest runs cleanly, all imports resolve, no hardcoded /Users/bippin paths remain, and critical paths (session init, handoff, guard system) are covered.
next_actions.why: Public release requires confidence that core functionality is tested, reproducible, and portable across machines.

next_actions.action: Review and finalize Homebrew formula (Formula/*.rb): ensure all dependencies are declared, installation paths are correct, post-install hooks work on macOS, and no hardcoded user paths exist.
next_actions.why: User's public commitment is 'brew install askr'; formula must be production-ready and work for any user.

next_actions.action: Test companion session handoff at 60% quota threshold to verify new window opens after reply completes without context loss
next_actions.why: Lifecycle fix was committed in prior session; needs end-to-end validation before public release.

next_actions.action: Scan entire codebase for hardcoded /Users/bippin paths and replace with environment-aware or relative paths
next_actions.why: Brew installation will fail or behave incorrectly if any hardcoded user paths remain in source or config.

blockers: CRITICAL: Live Discord webhook URL exposed in public GitHub history (commit 50eba93, origin/main) — must be removed via git history rewrite before public release
Launch-readiness audit results pending — awaiting background agent completion to identify all remaining blockers
Unknown: potential hardcoded /Users/bippin paths in codebase that will break brew installation
Unknown: test coverage gaps and deployment script readiness — audit in progress
